text:
/mn15 /ci2 1 ククク……やはり
俺の助けが必要か……いいだろう。
“黒き狼”の力、見せてやろう！

/mn15 /ci2 1 フッ……馴れ合いなど不要。
征くぞ！

/mn2 莫迦め、手段を選ぶからそうなる。
さて……《亡霊》に喰われたいヤツから
かかって来るがいい！

/mn15 /ci2 1 Heh-heh...so it turns out you need my help...okay.
I'll show you the power of "the Black Wolf!"

/mn15 /ci2 1 Hmph...no need for collusion, conspiracies, or
anything underhanded. Just conquest!
/mn2 Is this the...fate of the Phantom....?

/mn2 You fail because your methods are foolish. Now,
anyone who wants to be devoured by the Phantom,
have at me!
